title: Jmix Studio install-flow metadata
description: Metadata consumed by Jmix Studio to drive the 'Configure AI Agents' wizard. Defines a sequence of multi-input steps; each step optionally executes a shell command assembled from collected input values.

install-flow.description: Top-level container for the wizard flow.

steps.description: Steps shown to the user in order. Steps with a 'runIf' that points to a falsy earlier input id are skipped entirely.

step.description: A single step of the install flow. Steps may collect multiple inputs and optionally execute a shell command.

id.description: Optional step identifier used for diagnostics and per-step state restoration. Command substitution uses input ids, not step ids.

title.description: Main step title shown on the top.

message.description: Header text shown above the inputs.

runIf.description: If set, the step is rendered only when the referenced earlier input id has a truthy value. Falsy values: checkbox=false, options-multi=empty, userInput=blank.

inputs.description: Inputs collected from the user on this step. Each input has its own id used for ${id} command substitution.

command.description: Optional per-OS shell command. Supports ${id} placeholders that reference input ids (from this step or earlier) plus the implicit ${JMIX_VERSION} placeholder. The command is skipped when any input on this step has a falsy value.

inputUserInput.description: Free-text input. Optionally validated against a regular expression.

id.description: Unique input identifier used in command substitution via ${id}.

label.description: Optional row prefix shown to the left of the text field.

regex.description: Java regular expression. The full value must match (Regex.matches semantics).

errorMessage.description: Inline error shown when the regex does not match. Falls back to a generic message.

placeholder.description: Hint shown inside the text field when it is empty.

default.description: Initial value pre-filled in the field.

inputOptions.description: Choice between predefined values. Single-select renders as a combo box; multi-select renders as a check-box list.

id.description: Unique input identifier used in command substitution via ${id}.

label.description: Optional row prefix shown to the left of the widget.

multi.description: When true, multiple choices may be selected; the resolved value is a comma-joined list of chosen 'value' fields.

value.description: Value substituted into commands when this choice is selected.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

default.description: When true, this choice is preselected. For single-select inputs the last 'default: true' wins; for multi-select all matching choices are preselected.

inputCheckbox.description: Single boolean toggle. The 'label' field doubles as the text rendered next to the checkbox.

id.description: Unique input identifier used in command substitution via ${id}.

label.description: Text shown next to the checkbox.

valueIfTrue.description: Substitution string when the checkbox is checked. Defaults to 'true'.

valueIfFalse.description: Substitution string when the checkbox is unchecked. Defaults to 'false'.

commandByOs.description: Per-OS shell command. The host OS is detected via SystemInfo and the corresponding entry is executed.
